results.definition_en: A small flying insect with two wings.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 蒼蠅;有兩翼的小型飛蟲。
results.example_en: A fly is on the food.

results.definition_en: The lower part of the leg, used for standing or walking.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 腳;腿的下部，用以站立或行走。
results.example_en: I have a small cut on my foot.

results.definition_en: A small tool with sharp points, used for eating food.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 叉子;具尖頭的進食小工具。
results.example_en: Use a fork to eat the cake.

results.definition_en: A bird that is kept for its meat or eggs, like a chicken.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 家禽;為肉或蛋而養之鳥類，如雞。
results.example_en: The farm has many fowl.

results.definition_en: The hard outside part of a thing that gives it form.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 框、框架;給予事物外形的硬支撐部分。
results.example_en: The window has a wood frame.

results.definition_en: A piece of land near a house, where plants or flowers grow.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 花園、菜園;屋旁種植花草之地。
results.example_en: She has roses in her garden.

results.definition_en: A young female child.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 女孩;年幼的女性。
results.example_en: The girl is playing in the park.

results.definition_en: A piece of clothing for the hand, with parts for each finger.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 手套;分指可套於手上的衣物。
results.example_en: Put on your gloves in the cold.

results.definition_en: A small farm animal with horns, kept for milk and meat.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 山羊;有角、可取乳供肉之小型農場動物。
results.example_en: The goat ate the grass.

results.definition_en: A weapon that sends out a small piece of metal with force.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 槍;發射金屬小塊的武器。
results.example_en: The soldier carries a gun.

results.definition_en: The thin fine things that grow on the head and body of a person.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 頭髮、毛髮;長於頭部與身體的細絲狀物。
results.example_en: She has long brown hair.

results.definition_en: A tool with a heavy head, used to put in nails.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 鎚子;頭部沉重、用以敲釘的工具。
results.example_en: Use a hammer to fix the wood.

results.definition_en: The end of the arm, used for taking and holding things.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 手;手臂末端，用以抓取握持。
results.example_en: Give me your hand.

results.definition_en: A piece of clothing worn on the head.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 帽子;戴於頭部的衣物。
results.example_en: She wears a big sun hat.

results.definition_en: The top part of the body, where the eyes, ears, mouth, and brain are.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 頭;身體頂部，眼耳口腦所在處。
results.example_en: He put his hat on his head.

results.definition_en: The part of the body in the chest that sends blood round the body.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 心臟;胸內泵送血液之器官。
results.example_en: Her heart was beating fast.

results.definition_en: A curved piece of metal or other hard stuff, used to keep a thing up.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 鉤、掛鉤;彎曲的硬物，用以掛物。
results.example_en: Put your coat on the hook.

results.definition_en: One of the hard pointed things on the head of some animals.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 角;某些動物頭上的硬尖物。
results.example_en: The goat has long horns.

results.definition_en: A big strong farm animal used to pull or ride.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 馬;可拉動車輛或供騎乘的大型動物。
results.example_en: She rides a horse every day.

results.definition_en: A building where ill or hurt people go to get better.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 醫院;病人或傷者前往治療之處。
results.example_en: He is in hospital with a broken leg.

results.definition_en: A building where people live.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 房子;供人居住的建築。
results.example_en: Their house has a red roof.

results.definition_en: A piece of land with water round it on all sides.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 島嶼;四面環水的陸地。
results.example_en: The island is small but green.

results.definition_en: A small bright stone of great value, used for ornament.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 珠寶;用於裝飾的珍貴亮石。
results.example_en: Her ring has a small jewel.
results.example_zh_tw: 她的戒指鑲了顆小寶石。

results.definition_en: A metal container with a handle, used to boil water.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 水壺;帶把金屬容器，用以煮水。
results.example_en: Put the kettle on for tea.

results.definition_en: A small piece of metal made to open a lock.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 鑰匙;用以開鎖的小金屬片。
results.example_en: I lost the key to my house.
